bindings.title: Get Started Planting Native Plants - Homegrown National Park
bindings.excerpt: Get started planting native plants. Learn how to choose, plant, and care for native species that support biodiversity and wildlife in your own yard.

bindings.title: Design a Native Plant Landscape - Homegrown National Park
bindings.excerpt: We explain a step-by-step approach to design a native plant landscape and provide resources for finding native garden designs for your ecoregion.

bindings.title: Garden Designs - Native Garden Designs
bindings.excerpt: The designs were created with the premise that using native plants in landscaping can be beautiful, promote wildlife, and be achievable for gardeners of all skillsets in terms of scope and budget. Each design Looking for more native gardening inspiration? Take a peek at what our members are growing!
